name: One-Dish Meal/Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 can pork and beans, (16 ounces), drained
1 can lima beans, (16 ounces), rinsed and drained
1 cup cooked soybeans, drained (or great northern beans)
recipeInstructions:
This recipe serves a lot of people! It's perfect for family reunions. The variety of beans gives it an appealing look and a nice mix of flavors and textures.
1. Brown ground beef in a skillet, discarding excess fat. Transfer to slow cooker or crockpot.
2. Cook bacon until crispy; remove with paper towels.
3. In the same skillet, lightly brown onion, green onions, and green pepper. Add vegetables to the slow cooker with bacon.
4. Combine remaining ingredients (including liquid smoke) in the slow cooker.
5. Cover and cook on low for 4-6 hours, stirring occasionally.
